member.name: T:ProgrammingConcept.Parse
member.summary: Convert string to any data type without throwing an exception. All the methods inside this class are using TryParse method to convert the data. You can provide a fallback value if parsing is failed.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Parse.ToBool(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Convert string to true or false without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into boolean.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return boolean value after conversion.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Parse.ToBool(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Convert string to true or false without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into boolean.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return boolean value after conversion.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Parse.ToBool(System.String[],System.Boolean)
member.summary: Convert string to true or false without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into boolean.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return boolean value after conversion.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Parse.ToDouble(System.String,System.Double)
member.summary: Convert string to double without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into double.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return double value after conversion.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Parse.ToDouble(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Double)
member.summary: Convert string to double without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into double.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return double value after conversion.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Parse.ToDouble(System.String[],System.Double)
member.summary: Convert string to double without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into double.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return double value after conversion.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Parse.ToFloat(System.String,System.Single)
member.summary: Convert string to float without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into float.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return float value after conversion.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Parse.ToFloat(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Single)
member.summary: Convert string to float without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into float.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return float value after conversion.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Parse.ToFloat(System.String[],System.Single)
member.summary: Convert string to float without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into float.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return float value after conversion.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Parse.ToInt(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Convert string to integer value without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into integer value.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return integer value after conversion.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Parse.ToInt(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Int32)
member.summary: Convert string to integer value without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into integer value.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return integer value after conversion.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Parse.ToInt(System.String[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Convert string to integer value without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into integer value.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return integer value after conversion.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Parse.ToLong(System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Convert string to long value without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into long value.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return long value after conversion.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Parse.ToLong(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Int64)
member.summary: Convert string to long value without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into long value.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return long value after conversion.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Parse.ToLong(System.String[],System.Int64)
member.summary: Convert string to long value without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into long value.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return long value after conversion.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Parse.ToShort(System.String,System.Int16)
member.summary: Convert string to short value without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into short value.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return short value after conversion.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Parse.ToShort(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Int16)
member.summary: Convert string to short value without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into short value.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return short value after conversion.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Parse.ToShort(System.String[],System.Int16)
member.summary: Convert string to short value without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into short value.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return short value after conversion.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Parse.ToUint(System.String,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Convert string to unsigned interger value without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into unsigned interger value.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return unsigned interger value after conversion.

member.summary: Convert string to unsigned interger value without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into unsigned interger value.
Return this value if parsing is failed.

member.summary: Convert string to unsigned interger value without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into unsigned interger value.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return unsigned interger value after conversion.

member.summary: Convert string to unsigned long value without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into unsigned long value.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return unsigned long value after conversion.

member.summary: Convert string to unsigned long value without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into unsigned long value.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return unsigned long value after conversion.

member.summary: Convert string to unsigned long value without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into unsigned long value.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return unsigned long value after conversion.

member.summary: Convert string to unsigned short value without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into unsigned short value.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return unsigned short value after conversion.

member.summary: Convert string to unsigned short value without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into unsigned short value.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return unsigned short value after conversion.

member.summary: Convert string to unsigned short value without throwing exception.

member.summary: Convert string to byte value without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into byte value.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return byte value after conversion.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Parse.ToByte(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Byte)
member.summary: Convert string to byte value without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into byte value.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return byte value after conversion.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Parse.ToByte(System.String[],System.Byte)
member.summary: Convert string to byte value without throwing exception.
member.param: String that need to convert into byte value.
Return this value if parsing is failed.
member.returns: Return byte value after conversion.

member.name: T:ProgrammingConcept.StackedEvent
member.summary: Events that register in a stack form. It is useful when the UI elements are stacked on top of each other. Then the back button is pressed and closing UI elements method is invoked from top to the bottom.

member.name: E:ProgrammingConcept.StackedEvent.onZeroStackedEvent
member.summary: Event that will be invoked when there are no more event that can be invoked in the event list (stackedEventList).

member.name: F:ProgrammingConcept.StackedEvent.freeze
member.summary: When set to true. all the codes in all methods in this class wull not be implemented. Default value is false.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.StackedEvent.PushEvent(System.Action)
member.summary: Add an event on the top of the event list (stackedEventList).
member.param: Event that needs to add on the top of the event list (stackedEventList).

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.StackedEvent.PopTopEvent(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Remove the event on the top of the event list (stackedEventList).
member.param: After the event has removed from the event list (stackedEventList), the removed event needs to be executed or not.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.StackedEvent.PopOneEvent(System.Action,System.Boolean)
member.summary:
Remove a specific event. The event can be at the top, bottom or middle in the event list (stackedEventList). If it is the onZeroStackedEvent event, it will be executed, depend on given arguement in . The event in onZeroStackedEvent will not be removed.
Return -1 if the specific is not found.
Return 0 if the StackedEvent is freeze.
Return 1 if this function is successfully executed.
member.param: Event that needs to be removed from the event list (stackedEventList).
After the event has removed from the event list (stackedEventList), the removed event needs to be executed or not.
member.returns: Return -1 if the specific is not found.\nReturn 0 if the StackedEvent is freeze.\nReturn 1 if this function is successfully executed.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.StackedEvent.PopFromTopEvent(System.Action)
member.summary: Remove all the events from the top until the specific event.\nIf parameter is specified. The specific event will be removed too. Else, the specific event will not be removed from the event list (stackedEventList).\nIf specific event is not found, no event will be removed.
member.param: Event that needs to be removed from the event list (stackedEventList).
After the event has removed from the event list (stackedEventList), the removed event needs to be executed or not.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.StackedEvent.PopFromTopEvent(System.Action,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Remove all the events from the top until the specific event.\nIf parameter is specified. The specific event will be removed too. Else, the specific event will not be removed from the event list (stackedEventList).\nIf specific event is not found, no event will be removed.
member.param: Event that needs to be removed from the event list (stackedEventList).
After the event has removed from the event list (stackedEventList), the removed event needs to be executed or not.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.StackedEvent.ClearBackEventList
member.summary: Remove all the events in the event list (stackedEventList).

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.StackedEvent.ClearAllEvent
member.summary: Remove all the events in the event list (stackedEventList) and the event in onZeroStackedEvent.

member.name: T:ProgrammingConcept.Logic
member.summary: Comparison between two boolean and return true or false.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Logic.AND(System.Boolean[])
member.summary: Return true if all inputs are true.
member.param: Inputs in boolean.
member.returns: Return true if all inputs are true.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Logic.OR(System.Boolean[])
member.summary: Return true if any input or all inputs are true.
member.param: Inputs in boolean.
member.returns: Return true if any input or all inputs are true.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Logic.XOR(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Return true if inputA not equal to inputB.
member.param: First boolean.
Second boolean.
member.returns: Return true if inputA not equal to inputB.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Logic.NOT(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Return true if inputA is false. Return false if inputA is true.
member.param: First boolean.
member.returns: Return true if inputA is false. Return false if inputA is true.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Logic.NAND(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Return false if inputA and inputB are true.
member.param: First boolean.
Second boolean.
member.returns: Return false if inputA and inputB are true.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Logic.NOR(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Return true if inputA and inputB are false.
member.param: First boolean.
Second boolean.
member.returns: Return true if inputA and inputB are false.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Logic.XNOR(System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Return true if inputA equal to inputB.
member.param: First boolean.
Second boolean.
member.returns: Return true if inputA equal to inputB.

member.name: T:ProgrammingConcept.ColourHSV
member.summary: Colour in hSV format.

member.name: F:ProgrammingConcept.ColourHSV.hue
member.summary: Hue in HSV colour format.

member.name: F:ProgrammingConcept.ColourHSV.saturation
member.summary: Saturation in HSV colour format.

member.name: F:ProgrammingConcept.ColourHSV.value
member.summary: Value in HSV colour format.

member.name: T:ProgrammingConcept.ColourConverter
member.summary: Convert colour format between different colour space.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.ColourConverter.ComvertRgbToHsv(UnityEngine.Color)
member.summary: Convert from RGB colour into HSV colour.
member.param: RGB colour. All colours value must be in between 0 to 1.
Red colour. The colours value must be in between 0 to 1.
Green colour. The colours value must be in between 0 to 1.
Blue colour. The colours value must be in between 0 to 1.
member.returns: Return HSV colour. The value for hue is in between 0 to 360. The value for saturation and value is in between 0 to 1."/>.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.ColourConverter.ComvertRgbToHsv(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Convert from RGB colour into HSV colour.
member.param: RGB colour. All colours value must be in between 0 to 1.
Red colour. The colours value must be in between 0 to 1.
Green colour. The colours value must be in between 0 to 1.
Blue colour. The colours value must be in between 0 to 1.
member.returns: Return HSV colour. The value for hue is in between 0 to 360. The value for saturation and value is in between 0 to 1."/>.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.ColourConverter.ComvertHsvToRgb(ProgrammingConcept.ColourHSV)
member.summary: Convert from HSV colour into RGB colour.
member.param: HSV colour. The value for hue must be in between 0 to 360. The value for saturation and value must be in between 0 to 1.
Hue. The value must be in between 0 to 360.
Saturation. The value must be in between 0 to 1.
Value. The value must be in between 0 to 1.
member.returns: Return RGB colour. The value for all colours are in between 0 to 1."/>.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.ColourConverter.ComvertHsvToRgb(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Convert from HSV colour into RGB colour.
member.param: HSV colour. The value for hue must be in between 0 to 360. The value for saturation and value must be in between 0 to 1.
Hue. The value must be in between 0 to 360.
Saturation. The value must be in between 0 to 1.
Value. The value must be in between 0 to 1.
member.returns: Return RGB colour. The value for all colours are in between 0 to 1."/>.

member.name: T:ProgrammingConcept.SaveLoad
member.summary: Save and load file.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.SaveLoad.Save``1(System.String,System.Boolean,``0)
member.summary: Save data into provided path.
member.param: The full path of the file.
Check if folder exist. If set to false, make sure the folder directory is exist.
Data taht need to be saved.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.SaveLoad.Load``1(System.String)
member.summary: Load data from provided path.
member.param: The full path of the file.
member.returns: Return the data that has been loaded.

member.name: T:ProgrammingConcept.TransformHelper
member.summary: Additional calculation involve position, rotation and scale.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.TransformHelper.GetAngleTowardTarget(UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2,UnityEngine.Vector2@,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Calculate angle from source position toward target position.
member.param: Position of source object.
Position of target object.
Return distance from target position to source position.
Angle in degree. Set to false to return angle in radian.
member.returns: Return angle from source position toward target position.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.TransformHelper.LookAt(UnityEngine.Vector3,UnityEngine.Vector3)
member.summary: Make object's z-axis (forward direction) facing a target.
member.param: The source object position
The target object position
member.returns: Return the rotation of the source object

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.TransformHelper.TranslateInWorldSpace(System.Single,UnityEngine.Vector3,UnityEngine.Quaternion,UnityEngine.Animations.Axis)
member.summary: Move object in world space through object local axis.
member.param: The speed of the object.
The transform.position of the object.
The transform.rotation of the object.
The movement in object local axis.
member.returns: Return the updated position of the object.

member.name: T:ProgrammingConcept.TimeBasedEnergy
member.summary: Calculate how many energy can recover after passes a period of time.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.TimeBasedEnergy.GetAmountOfEnergyRecoverCooldownHasPassed(System.DateTime,System.Int32,System.DateTime@)
member.summary: Calculate how many times the energy cooldown has passed after a period of time.
member.param: The previous energy recover time.
The time interval before next energy recover.
The latest energy recover time.
member.returns: Return the amount of energy cooldown has fully passed.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.TimeBasedEnergy.GetTotlaEnergyRecover(System.DateTime,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.DateTime@)
member.summary: Calculate how many times the energy cooldown has passed after a period of time. It's same as TimeBasedEbergy.GetAmountOfEnergyRecoverCooldownHasPassed * energyRecoverPoint.
member.param: The previous energy recover time.
The time interval before next energy recover.
The amount of energy recover after cooldown. Use negative value for energy spend. If this value is 1, just use TimeBasedEbergy.GetAmountOfEnergyRecoverCooldownHasPassed function.
The latest energy recover time.
member.returns: Return the total energy has recovered.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.TimeBasedEnergy.GetEnergyRemain(System.DateTime,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.DateTime@)
member.summary: Calculate how many current energy remain after a period of time.
member.param: The previous energy recover time.
The time interval before next energy recover.
The amount of energy recover after cooldown. Use negative value for energy spend. If this value is 1, just use TimeBasedEbergy.GetAmountOfEnergyRecoverCooldownHasPassed function.
Current energy value.
Maximun energy value.
The latest energy recover time.
member.returns: Return the updated current energy value.

member.name: T:ProgrammingConcept.CameraRender
member.summary: Render a camera view and turn into sprite, texture 2D or render texture. If the UI needs to be included, make sure the Render Mode field in Canvas component has set to Screen Space - Camera or World Space. If Screen Space - Camera is selected, assign the camera that needs to perform the rendering into Render Camera field.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.CameraRender.RenderCameraViewToRenderTexture(UnityEngine.Camera,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Render a camera view and turn into render texture. Note that the render texture is an instance and require to release it manually when not in use anymore using RenderTexture.Release function.
member.param: The camera which use to render the view.
The width of the render texture.
The height of the render texture.
The depth of the render texture.
member.returns: Return the render texture instance.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.CameraRender.RenderCameraViewToTexture2D(UnityEngine.Camera,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,UnityEngine.TextureFormat)
member.summary: Render a camera view and turn into texture 2D. Note that the texture 2D is an instance and require to destroy it manually when not in use anymore.
member.param: The camera which use to render the view.
The width of the texture 2D.
The height of the texture 2D.
The depth of the texture 2D.
The colour format of the render texture.
member.returns: Return the texture 2D instance.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.CameraRender.RenderCameraViewToSprite(UnityEngine.Camera,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,UnityEngine.TextureFormat,UnityEngine.Vector2)
member.summary: Render a camera view and turn into sprite. Note that the texture 2D and sprite are an instance and require to destroy it manually when not in use anymore.
member.param: The camera which use to render the view.
The width of the sprite.
The height of the sprite.
The depth of the sprite.
The colour format of the sprite.
The pivot of the sprite.
member.returns: Return the sprite instance.

member.name: T:ProgrammingConcept.Mod.ModAsset
member.summary: Library use to load external assets.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Mod.ModAsset.LoadAssetBundle``1(System.String,System.Action{System.Collections.Generic.List{``0}})
member.summary: Load an asset bundle from given path. If file not exist, a FileNotFoundException will be thrown.
member.param: The path of the asset bundle.

This event is called when asset bundle has loaded complete. If there are multiple components in the asset bundle need to read, use a scriptable object script to assign all components inside and replace generic parameter with that scriptable object class.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Mod.ModAsset.LoadTextUsingFileStream(System.String)
member.summary: Load a text asset from given path. It cannot read asset from StreamingAssets folder in Android. Use UnityWebRequest class instead. If file not exist, a FileNotFoundException will be thrown.
member.param: The path of the text asset.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Mod.ModAsset.LoadBytesUsingFileStream(System.String)
member.summary: Load all bytes from a file given by path. It cannot read asset from StreamingAssets folder in Android. Use UnityWebRequest class instead. If file not exist, a FileNotFoundException will be thrown.
member.param: The path of the text asset.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Mod.ModAsset.LoadSpriteUsingFileStream(System.String)
member.summary: Load a sprite asset from given path. It cannot read asset from StreamingAssets folder in Android. Use UnityWebRequest class instead. If file not exist, a FileNotFoundException will be thrown.
member.param: The path of the sprite asset.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Mod.ModAsset.LoadTextUsingWebRequest(System.String)
member.summary: Load a text asset from given path using UnityWebRequest. It uses to read asset from StreamingAssets folder in Android. If file not exist, it returns an empty string.
member.param: The path of the text asset.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Mod.ModAsset.LoadBytesUsingWebRequest(System.String)
member.summary: Load all bytes from a file given by path using UnityWebRequest. It uses to read asset from StreamingAssets folder in Android. If file not exist, it returns an empty array.
member.param: The path of the text asset.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Mod.ModAsset.LoadSpriteUsingWebRequest(System.String)
member.summary: Load a sprite asset from given path using UnityWebRequest. It uses to read asset from StreamingAssets folder in Android. If file not exist, a returns null.
member.param: The path of the sprite asset.

member.name: T:ProgrammingConcept.Module.JiuGongGe`1
member.summary: Create a 9 tiles that arrange into 3 row x 3 column grid.

member.name: P:ProgrammingConcept.Module.JiuGongGe`1.upperLeft
member.summary: The first row and first column tile in the grid.

member.name: P:ProgrammingConcept.Module.JiuGongGe`1.upperMiddle
member.summary: The first row and second column tile in the grid.

member.name: P:ProgrammingConcept.Module.JiuGongGe`1.upperRight
member.summary: The first row and third column tile in the grid.

member.name: P:ProgrammingConcept.Module.JiuGongGe`1.middleLeft
member.summary: The second row and first column tile in the grid.

member.name: P:ProgrammingConcept.Module.JiuGongGe`1.center
member.summary: The second row and second column tile in the grid.

member.name: P:ProgrammingConcept.Module.JiuGongGe`1.middleRight
member.summary: The second row and third column tile in the grid.

member.name: P:ProgrammingConcept.Module.JiuGongGe`1.lowerLeft
member.summary: The third row and first column tile in the grid.

member.name: P:ProgrammingConcept.Module.JiuGongGe`1.lowerMiddle
member.summary: The third row and second column tile in the grid.

member.name: P:ProgrammingConcept.Module.JiuGongGe`1.lowerRight
member.summary: The third row and third column tile in the grid.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Module.JiuGongGe`1.#ctor
member.summary: Create a 9 tiles that arrange into 3 row x 3 column grid.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Module.JiuGongGe`1.ShiftLeft
member.summary: Move and replace the tiles 1 column from right side to left side. All third column tiles will have value of null.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Module.JiuGongGe`1.ShiftRight
member.summary: Move and replace the tiles 1 column from left side to right side. All first column tiles will have value of null.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Module.JiuGongGe`1.ShiftDown
member.summary: Move and replace the tiles 1 column from upper side to lower side. All first row tiles will have value of null.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Module.JiuGongGe`1.ShiftUp
member.summary: Move and replace the tiles 1 column from lower side to upper side. All third row tiles will have value of null.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Module.JiuGongGe`1.Copy(ProgrammingConcept.Module.JiuGongGe{`0})
member.summary: Create a copy of grid from source.
member.param: The source data of the grid.
member.returns: Return a copy of the grid data.

member.name: T:ProgrammingConcept.Optimization.Singleton`1
member.summary: Make the class unique and only one can be exist through all scenes.

member.name: P:ProgrammingConcept.Optimization.Singleton`1.Instance
member.summary: The unique reference of the class.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Optimization.Singleton`1.Initialize
member.summary: It calls after setup completed in Awake function.

member.name: T:ProgrammingConcept.Optimization.ObjectPooling`1
member.summary: This class allows user to store a list of objects into an active list and an inactive list so that these objects can be recycle and reuse later instead of using Instantiate and Destroy function.
member.param: Function call that create the game objects in a scene.
The amount of createFunction call at the begining.

member.name: P:ProgrammingConcept.Optimization.ObjectPooling`1.activeList
member.summary: Objects that are active in the scene.

member.name: P:ProgrammingConcept.Optimization.ObjectPooling`1.inactiveList
member.summary: Objects that are not active in the scene.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Optimization.ObjectPooling`1.#ctor(System.Func{`0[]},System.Int32)
member.summary: This class allows user to store a list of objects into an active list and an inactive list so that these objects can be recycle and reuse later instead of using Instantiate and Destroy function.
member.param: Function call that create the game objects in a scene.
The amount of createFunction call at the begining.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Optimization.ObjectPooling`1.GetAnActiveItem
member.summary: Get an object in the inactive list. **IMPORTANT** The gameObject.Setactive(bool) has to manually set.
member.returns: Return an object from inactive list.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Optimization.ObjectPooling`1.SetAnItemToInactive(`0)
member.summary: Assign an object into inactive list. **IMPORTANT** The gameObject.Setactive(bool) has to manually set.
member.param: The object that need to assign into inactive list..

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.Optimization.ObjectPooling`1.SetAllItemToInactive
member.summary: Set all active object into inactive list.

member.name: T:ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.RandomGenerator
member.summary: Return a random data based on a given set of data or value.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.RandomGenerator.GetName(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Generate a random name in the given name list.
member.param: String that contain a number of names.
member.returns: Return empty string if there are no value inside .

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.RandomGenerator.GetName(System.String[])
member.summary: Generate a random name in the given name list.
member.param: String that contain a number of names.
member.returns: Return empty string if there are no value inside .

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.RandomGenerator.GetNames(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generate a list of random name in the given name list.
member.param: String that contain a number of names.
Number of random names will be generated.
Generated name can be repeated?
member.returns: Return null if there are no value inside or is 0.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.RandomGenerator.GetNames(System.String[],System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generate a list of random name in the given name list.
member.param: String that contain a number of names.
Number of random names will be generated.
Generated name can be repeated?
member.returns: Return null if there are no value inside or is 0.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.RandomGenerator.GetNamesFromTxtFile(System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generate a list of random name from a given txt file. In the txt file, each name must seperate with newline.
member.param: The full directory and the file name with extension.
Number of random names will be generated.
Generated name can be repeated?
member.returns: Return null if does not exist, or txt file does not have any content, or is 0.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.RandomGenerator.GetIntegers(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Int32},System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generate a list of random name in the given integer list.
member.param: List of integer for picking.
Number of random integer will be generated.
Generated integer can be repeated?
member.returns: Return null if there are no value inside or is 0.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.RandomGenerator.GetIntegers(System.Int32[],System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generate a list of random name in the given integer list.
member.param: List of integer for picking.
Number of random integer will be generated.
Generated integer can be repeated?
member.returns: Return null if there are no value inside or is 0.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.RandomGenerator.GetIntegersFromTxtFile(System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generate a list of random integer from a given txt file. In the txt file, each integer must seperate with newline.
member.param: The full directory and the file name with extension.
Number of random integer will be generated.
Generated integer can be repeated?
member.returns: Return null if does not exist, or txt file does not have any content, or is 0.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.RandomGenerator.GetFloats(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Single},System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generate a list of random float number from the given float list.
member.param: List of float number for picking.
Number of random float number will be generated.
Generated float number can be repeated?
member.returns: Return null if there are no value inside or is 0.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.RandomGenerator.GetFloats(System.Single[],System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generate a list of random float number from the given float list.
member.param: List of float number for picking.
Number of random float number will be generated.
Generated float number can be repeated?
member.returns: Return null if there are no value inside or is 0.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.RandomGenerator.GetFloatsFromTxtFile(System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generate a list of random float number from a given txt file. In the txt file, each float number must seperate with newline.
member.param: The full directory and the file name with extension.
Number of random float number will be generated.
Generated float number can be repeated?
member.returns: Return null if does not exist, or txt file does not have any content, or is 0.

member.name: T:ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.PollChance
member.summary: Get a random data based on the poll amount in a list of poll data.

member.name: T:ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.PollChance.PollData`1
member.summary: This is a raw poll number for each data. You need to put this poll data in a list.

member.name: T:ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.PollChance.PollAccumulateData`1
member.summary: This is a accumulate poll number for each data. Use PollChance.GeneratePollAccumulateData function to generate this list, and put this list into PollChance.GetRandomDataFromPollAccumulateData function to get a random data from the list.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.PollChance.Combine``1(System.Collections.Generic.List{ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.PollChance.PollData{``0}},System.Collections.Generic.List{ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.PollChance.PollData{``0}})
member.summary: Combine two PollData lists into one.
member.param: The source list.
The additional list.
member.returns: Return combined PollData list.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.PollChance.GeneratePollAccumulateData``1(System.Collections.Generic.List{ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.PollChance.PollData{``0}})
member.summary: Generate PollAccumulateData list from PollData list.
member.param: Raw poll number for each data in a list.
member.returns: Return accumulate poll number foe each data in a list. Use in PollChance.GetRandomDataFromPollAccumulateData function.

member.name: M:ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.PollChance.GetRandomDataFromPollAccumulateData``1(System.Collections.Generic.List{ProgrammingConcept.RandomChance.PollChance.PollAccumulateData{``0}})
member.summary: Get a random data from a accumulate poll data list.
member.param: Accumulate poll number for each data in a list.
member.returns: Return a random data from a accumulate poll data list.
